title: Epoli
description: Origins / Apoli power types & entity actions additions.
body:
[**Requires Origins/Apoli**](https://github.com/apace100/apoli/releases)

[**Wiki**](http://epoli-docs.readthedocs.io/)

Epoli adds new powers and entity actions to the mod Apoli! It is fairly small at the moment, only with a few additions but you can always suggest in the comments of powers/actions/conditions you would like to see.
 

**__Added Powers:__**

- Action On Death

- Action On XP Gain

- Action On Trigger

- Passive

- Prevent Soulsand Slowness
 

**__Added Actions:__**

- Save Location

- Teleport to Location (Saved)

- Teleport to Spawn

- Teleport

 

 Contact: Exzotic#7100 (Discord)
